title: Fixing TF to < 2.16
body:
Description: Pin TensorFlow version to < 2.16 to ensure compatibility with the codebase's TensorFlow 1.x compatibility usage (tf.compat.v1).

Related Issues: #2073

Rationale: The repository relies on TensorFlow compatibility APIs and may face breaking changes in TF 2.16+. This PR adds explicit version constraints to prevent upgrading to TF 2.16+ unintentionally.

step_plan.summary: Pin TensorFlow to versions below 2.16 in setup.py to preserve TF 1.x compatibility usage and prevent accidental upgrades that could break tf.compat.v1 code paths.

steps.operation: Pin TensorFlow version in install_requires and extras_require['gpu'] to <2.16
steps.reason: To prevent upgrading to TensorFlow 2.16+ which may introduce breaking changes for tf.compat.v1 based code paths used in the project
steps.side_effects: Dependency resolution will constrain TF to <2.16 for both base install and GPU extras; may require re-installation in environments; CI and test suites should be run with TF<2.16; potential impact on environments expecting TF 2.x features
